summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Talent professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve the candidate and people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Work directly with hiring stakeholders across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales teams}, iterating requirements and processes to keep 20+ programs on track
Drive {data|metrics-informed} decisions—using enrollment and feedback {data|data} to rapidly experiment, iterate, and improve outcomes
Own end-to-end {coord|program lifecycles and operations}, taking full ownership from high-leverage strategy to the work that keeps things running
Foster trust-based relationships and {cross|warm, creative communication} with 600+ participants, achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Delivered strategic HR solutions across employee relations, headcount, and succession planning, partnering closely with senior leaders
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding processes for new hires across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Strengthened {ex|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Filled a challenging international role full-cycle—drafting job descriptions, posting openings, sourcing, and researching global compensation
Engaged global talent via personalized, compelling outreach and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
